form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning post a big 4.5 len win. Lismore Super Mdn-Sw September 26 over 1210m defeating Hostile La Vista carrying 56.5kg at $7. On debut fourth in a small field at Lismore Cge Mdn-Sw September 11 over 1120m, 1.75 len behind Headstrong with 54.5kg at $3.90. Promising gelding who looks all set for a bright return.

form.formComment: Most recently favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; scored a big 3 len win at this track Mdn-Sw March 23 over 1000m in heavy going defeating Virginia Breezes with 58.5kg at $2.45. Before that 5th of 8 at Grafton Super Mdn on January 25 over 1183m, 1.75 len behind Evony with 57.5kg at $6. Well drawn and sure to be in the finish.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 11 at Port Macquarie Bm50 on March 28 over 1008m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind El Beatle with 57kg at $7.50. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Coffs Harbour Bm58 on March 9 over 1010m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Personal Space carrying 57kg at $7. Racing okay without threatening - each-way from the nice gate.
